sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79603" key="parqesi/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρθεσίη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">παρατίθημι</etym>) <sense id="n79603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deposit, pledge,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.37</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
